name: platform-docs
description: Grounds platform-API answers in live official documentation — Apple docs, Microsoft Learn, and Google's developer knowledge base — when developing native applications for macOS, iOS, iPadOS, watchOS, tvOS, visionOS, Windows, or Android. Auto-engages via the 'platform-docs' skill whenever platform SDK code, OS APIs, or store-submission questions come up; MCP-first, with a WebFetch/WebSearch fallback when a platform's docs MCP isn't connected.
